---
title: "Field Notes"
format: html
listing: 
    contents: field_notes
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    # The 'Clean' Look
    image-align: right
    image-height: "0px" # Effectively hides the image placeholder
    fields: [date, title, reading-time, categories]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Observation"
      date: "Logged"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
---
